$schema: Dashy Store catalogue — a list of app manifests. See README → "The Store".

apps.name: Welcome Demo
apps.description: A demo entry that shows how the Dashy Store works. Installing it adds a card to your dashboard that links to the Dashy project. Use it as a template for your own catalogue apps.
apps.author: Dashy

apps.name: Static Site Demo
apps.description: Example of a 'static' app: Dashy downloads the zip/file from source_url and re-hosts it on this server at /store-apps/<id>/ (or on a subdomain if wildcard DNS is on). Replace source_url with your own .zip or single .html.
apps.author: Dashy

apps.name: Deploy Demo
apps.description: Example of a 'deploy' app: Dashy shows this docker-compose, collects the required env vars, deploys the stack through a driver (Docker / Coolify / Portainer / Manual), then you give the resulting URL the card points to.
apps.author: Dashy

deploy.docker_compose:
services:
  app:
    image: nginxdemos/hello:plain-text
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
